subject: Update P0022 plan frontmatter and task summary
description:
After all other tasks complete (Tasks #1-9), update the plan file plans/P0022_2026-05-07_10-00_preprocessing-pipeline-modularization/P0022_2026-05-07_10-00_preprocessing-pipeline-modularization.md:
1. Update frontmatter status to 'complete' (or 'focus' if any tasks remain blocked).
2. Add completed: timestamp and outcome_summary field.
3. Mark Phase 5 checkbox items as done.
4. Add a final session note (2026-06-22) documenting: EDA scripts created for 3 categories, parameters updated, master orchestrator created, docs routed to docs/analysis/.
5. Verify all success criteria in the plan are met.
